name: Chang Wah Electromaterials Inc.
summary: Chang Wah Electromaterials Inc. operates as an agency for packaging materials and equipment in Taiwan. The company offers various IC packaging materials; IC packaging devices, such as auto molding, trim and form, and package sawing equipment, as well as fluid dispensing systems; and TFT-LCD products. It also provides LED mold technology with liquid compound/compression mold and LED lead frames for ejection molding; EMC LED lead frames for transfer molding; and solar power systems. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
